content.verdict: Crown Towers Perth is Western Australia's only true 6-star, located across the Swan River from the CBD on the Burswood entertainment complex. 500 rooms, 1,200 sq m of infinity pool deck (the largest hotel pool in Australia), Nobu and Rockpool restaurants on-site, Crown Spa, Crystal Club premium lounge, casino, and direct access to Optus Stadium. The honeymoon angle: spectacular pool, world-class dining, and Margaret River wine country an easy day-trip away.
content.best_room: Crystal Club Premier room (52 m²) is the sweet spot — Crystal Club lounge access (free breakfast, evening canapés, all-day drinks), king bed, river view. Crown Villas (the suites) have private terraces and pool butlers. Avoid the lower-floor Deluxe rooms (no view, casino noise possible).

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival in Perth
itinerary_7_nights.description: Fly into PER. 15-min hotel transfer. Welcome to Crystal Club for arrival drinks. Settle into your room. Dinner at Nobu — black cod miso, Wagyu sashimi, sake pairing. Late-night soak in your tub with a Margaret River Cab Sauv.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Pool day + Optus Stadium tour
itinerary_7_nights.description: Slow morning at the infinity pool — cabanas, swim-up bar, river view. Lunch at Atrium. Afternoon Optus Stadium tour (Australia's most architecturally-awarded stadium, walk distance). Evening cocktails at TWR rooftop bar. Dinner at Rockpool.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Margaret River day-trip (long)
itinerary_7_nights.description: Early start for the 3h drive to Margaret River wine region. Vineyard tastings (Vasse Felix, Cape Mentelle, Leeuwin Estate). Lunch at Wills Domain. Drive back via Bunker Bay beach. Late dinner in your room or at TWR bar.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Rottnest Island ferry + quokka selfies
itinerary_7_nights.description: Ferry to Rottnest (1h from Fremantle). Bicycle the island, swim at Pinky Beach, find quokkas (the world's happiest animal). Lunch at Pinkys Beach Club. Return ferry. Spa massage on return. Dinner at Silks Chinese.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Spa day + Kings Park sunset
itinerary_7_nights.description: Couples' La Prairie spa ritual (2h). Lunch by the pool. Afternoon at Kings Park (one of the world's largest inner-city parks) for the sunset over the city skyline. Dinner at Bistro Guillaume.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Fremantle + beach
itinerary_7_nights.description: Train (15 min) to Fremantle for cappuccino strip + Fremantle Markets + lunch at Bread in Common. Afternoon at Cottesloe Beach. Sundown cocktails back at TWR. Dinner at Nobu (a second time — it's that good).

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell breakfast & departure
itinerary_7_nights.description: Crystal Club breakfast. Final swim. 15-min transfer to PER for return flight.

caveats: Casino on-site means the lobby vibe is more glitzy than refined.
Perth is a long flight from Sydney/Melbourne (4h+) and from international gateways (Singapore connection often easiest).
Margaret River wine country is a 3h drive — usually worth a 2-night stay rather than a day-trip.
Pool can be busy with stadium-game-day guests; Crystal Club access gets you VIP cabanas.
No beach at the hotel — Cottesloe is 25 min by car.

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Yes for couples wanting Margaret River wine country combined with city luxury. Less iconic than Sydney/Hamilton/Uluru but excellent value-luxury and the best pool in any Australian city hotel.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: October–April (Perth's warm season, swimming weather, long evenings). Winter (June–Aug) is mild but pool experience is muted.

faqs.question: Book in advance?
faqs.answer: 2–3 months for Crystal Club rooms in peak summer. Crown Villas need 4+ months for any peak weekend.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: No — large hotel with families, business, sports event guests.

faqs.question: Best room type?
faqs.answer: Crystal Club Premier for the Crystal Club lounge access; Crown Villa for honeymoon upgrades.

faqs.question: How to get there?
faqs.answer: Fly to Perth (PER). 15-min hotel transfer. International connections through Singapore (SQ) or Doha (QR) are most direct from Europe.
